description:
Create a custom point style for populated places using an external SVG graphic. Create an SVG file named 'star.svg' containing a star icon with a yellow fill (#FFFF00) and black stroke. In GeoServer, create a new style named 'star_marker' that uses 'star.svg' as an ExternalGraphic for point symbolization with a size between 16-24px. Assign 'star_marker' as the default style for the 'ne_populated_places' layer. 

GeoServer Admin: http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ (admin / Admin123!)
